steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to name the sculpture (Sister), identify Catlett as its creator, and state the year it was created (1973). All three pieces of information must appear.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'cites an unrelated year': gives a year other than 1973, so it fails the date requirement. ✗
  • Choice B — 'omits the year': names the sculpture and Catlett but never states when it was created. ✗
  • Choice C — 'omits the year': similarly leaves out 1973. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Elizabeth Catlett created the bronze sculpture Sister in 1973': supplies all three required elements — creator, title, and year. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
